历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10861 → 12544 → 14686 → 26392 → 16516, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to adjustments in major group structure, an abnormal high ranking (26392) occurred, which dropped back to 16516 in 2025. Over the past 5 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 5655 places, with the 2025 baseline around 16516. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 45 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 35 in 2025, with a significant reduction in 2025. The 2026 plan is 44 students, an increase of 9 students (+25.7%) compared to 2025, indicating a notable recovery in enrollment quotas and some relief in competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 65–76 range, placing the university at the upper-middle level nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 92nd, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms. No abnormal signals related to Southwestern University of Finance and Economics have been found in historical admission anomaly records, indicating a stable application psychology environment. Applied Economics is rated A+ (top nationally), Business Administration A, Statistics A-, highlighting outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines. The Physics Category enrollment majors include Financial Technology, Actuarial Science, Statistics, Computer Science, and other interdisciplinary fields, with strong disciplinary evaluation support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer Science has seen a decline in social popularity (2024 heat index 67.8), while Electronics/Communication and Electrical Engineering remain highly recommended. Finance/Economics/Business categories are in a wait-and-see state. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in the province is approximately 393,700, with an estimated Physics Category count of about 251,400 based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.64% compared to 2025 (249,800), leading to slightly intensified competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and is a benchmark institution for finance and economics in the southwestern region. Hubei Province is not a major source of local students for this university, with recent Physics Category enrollment accounting for about 0.3%–0.6%, and cross-provincial applications are limited by regional preferences.
Considering the core favorable factor of the 2025 baseline ranking of 16516 and the 25.7% expansion in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (from 35 to 44 students), along with secondary factors such as a 0.64% slight increase in the total number of examinees in the province, stable reputation, and high popularity of engineering majors like Electronics/Electrical, it is judged that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will shift backward compared to 2025 (ranking number increases, competition eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19094, with a range of 18594–19594.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Actuarial Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Statistics (Statistics, Data Science)

- Finance (Finance, Financial Engineering, etc.)
- Business Administration (School of Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering (Computational Finance, Big Data Management and Application)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Marketing, etc.)
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Business English).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (18594–19594), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<18594), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Financial Technology, Actuarial Science, Accounting CPA). For rankings near the upper bound (>19594), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 66th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years, indicating a mid-to-upper level comprehensive strength nationwide; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, rated as average, with moderately low exposure on short video platforms; no abnormal historical admission signals related to Southwestern University of Finance and Economics, indicating a stable application psychological environment; Applied Economics is A+ (top in the country), Business Administration is A, Statistics is A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, highly matching the university's enrollment majors, and having sustained appeal for students interested in finance and economics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The social popularity of finance/banking/economics majors shows a divergent and wait-and-see trend (2024), while accounting/finance/auditing majors are recommended; the total number of college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 393,700, with an estimated 142,300 in the History Category based on recent proportions, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (141,400), indicating slightly intensified competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, and is a benchmark finance and economics institution in the Southwest region; Hubei Province is not a major local source province for this university, with the History Category enrollment proportion in recent years being about 0.5%–1%, and cross-province applications are limited by regional preferences.
